title: Consistent SpawnEggs
description: Regrouping spawn egg sizes to be more logical! with some tweaks thrown in there.
body:
I decided to split the egg sizes more cohesively because it bugged me how the Ender dragon egg was the same size as the cow egg.

Big eggs: Ender dragon, Warden, etc...
Medium eggs: Cows, Sheep, etc...
Small eggs: Bees, Allays, etc...

Some additional changes I decided to do were
1. Simplification: Some eggs were too busy for their own good, to the point of losing their egg shape.
2. Removed Water Puddle: I don't think they're necessary.

join our [discord!](https://discord.gg/X76CFdvdag)
